productDisplayName: Ganuchi Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this slip-on nubuck shoe from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it barefoot and pair it with capris and stylish t-shirts for unparalleled cool.UpperOne-piece nubuck upper and outsole with rugged stitch detailing on the forefoot and a foldover backfoot overlay with TPR lugsSlip-on style for ease of wearNubuck lace running through eyelets along the wide collar and tied up above the tongue to customise the FitSynthetic leather footbed with print for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleCircular and oval TPR lugs spread throughout the outsole for gripShoe careRemove dust and dirt using a nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this slip-on nubuck shoe from Ganuchi is a great buy.
